description_long: This is an ornate ring featuring a split shank design, with one band encrusted with a row of round gemstones and the other culminating in a larger, circular cluster of stones. The gemstones are set in prongs, giving the ring a sparkling, multi-faceted appearance. The band appears to be made of a polished metal, likely white gold or platinum, which enhances the brilliance of the stones. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, with the gemstone-encrusted band curving gracefully to meet the central cluster. The craftsmanship suggests a high level of detail, with each stone meticulously set to maximize light reflection. This piece is both eye-catching and elegant, suitable for formal occasions or as a statement accessory.
description: A split shank ring with one band lined with gemstones and a central cluster of stones, crafted from polished metal for a sparkling, elegant look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the split shank and the row of prong-set gemstones along one band.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the full circular band and the continuous line of gemstones.
description_view_2: Angled view revealing the central cluster of stones and the asymmetrical split design.
description_view_3: Bottom view focusing on the underside of the band and the gemstone settings.
